steps.title: Identify what to calculate
steps.content: The tip is 20% of the \$50 bill. We need to find 20% of \$50.

steps.title: Convert percentage to decimal and multiply
steps.content:
To find a percentage of a number, convert the percentage to decimal form and multiply:
$$20\% = 0.20$$
$$\text{Tip} = 0.20 \times 50 = 10$$
The tip Hanna gave is \$10.
